channel.title: Nature on The Daily Thrum
channel.description: Recent content in Nature on The Daily Thrum

item.title: Possum Says His Experience Of “Number Twos” Has Been “Something Else” Since He Started Doing Them On Balcony
item.description:
SYDNEY — A local brushtail possum has described his experience of doing “number twos” on a man’s balcony as “something else”, saying the elevated suburban platform had completely transformed his relationship with outdoor defecation.

Possum Nathan Norton, who lives somewhere between a jacaranda tree, a roof cavity and the spiritual boundary of City of Ryde enforcement, said he first discovered the balcony late last week while searching for fruit, insects, shelter and somewhere inappropriate to leave small dark pellets.
